description: Letter in Hebrew from a man with the unusual name of Revaya (? רויה) to a ḥaver who was the leader of the Fustat community, currently in Alexandria.The sender asks him to force a "cut-off" man named Yosef to repay a loan of 2.5 dinars. The sender wanted to travel to Malij to find Yosef because the latter intended to leave for Tyre and Jerusalem, but the parnas ʿAllūn and the wife of the ḥaver held him back with force. (Information from Goitein's index cards and CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בעברית מאיש בשם רויה לחבר שהיה מנהיג קהילת פסטאט, הנמצא כעת באלכסנדריה. הכותב מבקש לכפות על יוסף 'המנותק' להחזיר הלוואה של 2.5 דינרים.
